Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** on loisirs74.fr:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is the only large natural sandy beach on Lake Annecy. Located on the western shore, with views of the Dents de Lanfon and the Tournette, it extends over about 2,200 m² and combines a fine sandy beach (about 100 meters long) with expansive shaded meadows.

## Opening Times & Access
The municipal beach is open year-round: free and open access from September to June, paid and supervised access from July 1 to August 31 from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM.

More specifically:
- January 1 – June 30: Daily free access.
- July 1 – August 31: Paid access from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM (swimming supervised by lifeguards). Closed from 7:00 to 9:30 AM for cleaning.
- September 1 – December 31: Daily free access.

## Pricing (2026)
Adult (18 years and older): €2.60 · Child 10–17 years: €1 · Under 10 years: free · Entry after 4:30 PM: €1 · Season ticket (unlimited access July–August): €22 · Chip card support (processing fee): €2. Off-season (Sept.–June): free.

## Ticketing
Online ticketing at saint-jorioz.fr (E-Shop): purchase of chip card, 10–20 pack, or single ticket (QR code by email). Purchase is also possible at the beach ticket offices or at the town hall.

## Labels & Accessibility
Awarded the Blue Flag label since 2010, the beach guarantees high environmental standards: daily cleaning during the season, sand renewal every four years, waste management, and public awareness. It has also received the Tourism and Disability label thanks to special facilities: water access and free provision of two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) in July–August.

## Practical Info
- **Dogs:** Dogs are prohibited year-round at the Plage de Saint-Jorioz facility, even on a leash, in accordance with the Blue Flag label.
- **Parking:** The Plage de Saint-Jorioz has a large free shaded parking lot in front of the entrance. In summer it is often full: arrive before 11:00 AM or use the alternative parking areas (marina, sports complex).

*Note: The information was confirmed on the official website on May 14, 2026, subject to seasonal changes.*

input.prompt: Extract exactly three things: (1) the entry price / tarifs, (2) the opening hours / horaires, and (3) wheelchair accessibility / accessibilité PMR fauteuil roulant. Quote the specific figures and details.

content.content:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Key Information

**(1) Entry Price / Tarifs:**
"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit · Entrée après 16h30 : 1 €"

**(2) Opening Hours / Horaires:**
"1er juillet – 31 août : accès payant de 9h30 à 17h30" with lifeguard supervision. Access is free and open year-round outside this summer period (September through June).

**(3) Wheelchair Accessibility / Accessibilité PMR:**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau, tapis avec main courante et deux fauteuils amphibies (tiralo + hippocampe) gratuits en juillet-août" The beach holds the "Tourisme et Handicap" label and features level ground entrance and adapted restrooms.

content.text:
Here are the three facts for **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**, from [loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz):

**1. Entry price** — Paid access applies only in summer (1 July–31 August); free the rest of the year.
- Adult (18+): €2.60
- Child 10–17: €1
- Under 10: free
- Entry after 4:30 PM: €1
- (Season pass: €22)

**2. Opening hours** — Open year-round.
- 1 July – 31 August: paid, lifeguard-supervised access from **9:30 AM to 5:30 PM**
- September through June: free, open access

**3. Wheelchair accessibility** — Accessible, with the *Tourisme & Handicap* label. Facilities include a ramp to the water, a beach mat with handrail, adapted restrooms, and **two free amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo + Hippocampe)** available in July–August.

Source: [Plage de Saint-Jorioz — Loisirs 74](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz)

(As requested, this was read-only — I only browsed and read pages, and submitted no forms or bookings.)
